title: Vietnamese Fried Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and flavorful Vietnamese noodle soup made with fried noodles and a rich broth. Serve with a side of fresh herbs and lime wedges.
instructions: Cook the Vietnamese rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp broth, soy sauce, and fish sauce to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the pot and stir to combine.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the noodle soup hot, garnished with fried shallots and chopped cilantro.
Serve with a side of fresh herbs and lime wedges.
